text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Bloomington, IL. It is a single family detached ranch style house. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Emerson St, to the South by Locust St, to the East by Towanda Ave, and to the West by Main St.
